sentences.target: Je colle une affiche sur la porte.
sentences.reading: /ʒə kɔl yn a.fiʃ syʁ la pɔʁt/

translations.fr: Je colle une affiche sur la porte.
translations.ipa: /ʒə kɔl yn a.fiʃ syʁ la pɔʁt/
translations.en: I’m sticking a poster on the door.
translations.es: Estoy pegando un póster en la puerta.
translations.de: Ich klebe ein Plakat an die Tür.
translations.it: Sto attaccando un poster sulla porta.
translations.zh-Hans: 我正在把海报贴在门上。
translations.yue: 我喺門上面貼緊張海報。
translations.pt: Estou colando um cartaz na porta.
translations.vi: Tôi đang dán một tấm poster lên cửa.
translations.nl: Ik plak een poster op de deur.
translations.hi: मैं दरवाज़े पर पोस्टर चिपका रहा हूँ.
translations.nb: Jeg henger opp en plakat på døren.
translations.sv: Jag sätter upp en affisch på dörren.
translations.da: Jeg sætter en plakat op på døren.
translations.ja: ドアにポスターを貼っています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (1st person singular); clitic placed before the verb; controls verb agreement.
Main verb, present indicative (1st person singular); transitive; takes a direct object NP ('une affiche').
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'affiche', marking indefiniteness.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the NP; direct object of 'colle'.
Preposition introducing a locative PP complement ('la porte').
Definite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'porte', marking definiteness.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'sur'.

sentences.target: Tu regardes cette affiche du concert.

translations.fr: Tu regardes cette affiche du concert.
translations.en: You’re looking at that concert poster.
translations.es: Estás mirando ese póster del concierto.
translations.de: Du schaust dir dieses Konzertplakat an.
translations.it: Stai guardando quel poster del concerto.
translations.ko: 너는 그 콘서트 포스터를 보고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你正在看那张演唱会海报。
translations.yue: 你喺度睇嗰張演唱會海報。
translations.ru: Ты смотришь на тот концертный плакат.
translations.pt: Você está olhando para aquele cartaz do concerto.
translations.he: אתה מסתכל על הפוסטר ההוא של הקונצרט.
translations.vi: Bạn đang nhìn tấm poster buổi hòa nhạc đó.
translations.ar: أنت تنظر إلى ذلك الملصق الخاص بالحفل.
translations.uk: Ти дивишся на той концертний плакат.
translations.hi: तुम उस कॉन्सर्ट का पोस्टर देख रहे हो.
translations.el: Κοιτάζεις εκείνη την αφίσα της συναυλίας.
translations.nb: Du ser på den konsertplakaten der.
translations.id: Kamu sedang melihat poster konser itu.
translations.sv: Du tittar på den där konsertaffischen.
translations.ro: Te uiți la acel afiș de concert.
translations.cs: Díváš se na ten koncertní plakát.
translations.da: Du kigger på den der koncertplakat.
translations.ja: あなたはそのコンサートのポスターを見ています.

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (2nd person singular); clitic before the verb; controls verb agreement.
Main verb, present indicative (2nd person singular); transitive; takes direct object 'cette affiche'.
Demonstrative determiner, feminine singular; specifies the noun 'affiche'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the NP serving as direct object of 'regardes'.
Preposition (contraction of 'de' + 'le'); introduces a nominal complement ('concert') specifying the poster's topic.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'du'.

sentences.target: Nous dessinons une affiche pour l'école.

translations.fr: Nous dessinons une affiche pour l'école.
translations.en: We’re drawing a poster for school.
translations.es: Estamos dibujando un póster para la escuela.
translations.de: Wir zeichnen ein Plakat für die Schule.
translations.it: Stiamo disegnando un poster per la scuola.
translations.ko: 우리는 학교에 낼 포스터를 그리고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们正在为学校画海报。
translations.yue: 我哋喺度為學校畫海報。
translations.pt: Estamos desenhando um cartaz para a escola.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang vẽ một tấm poster cho trường.
translations.nl: We tekenen een poster voor de school.
translations.hi: हम स्कूल के लिए पोस्टर बना रहे हैं.
translations.el: Σχεδιάζουμε μια αφίσα για το σχολείο.
translations.nb: Vi tegner en plakat til skolen.
translations.id: Kami sedang menggambar poster untuk sekolah.
translations.sv: Vi ritar en affisch till skolan.
translations.da: Vi tegner en plakat til skolen.
translations.ja: 私たちは学校のためにポスターを描いています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (1st person plural); clitic before the verb; controls verb agreement.
Main verb, present indicative (1st person plural); transitive; takes direct object 'une affiche'.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'affiche'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the NP; direct object of 'dessinons'.
Preposition introducing a purpose/beneficiary PP ('l'école').
Definite article with elision before a vowel-initial noun; feminine singular here; determiner for 'école'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Ils retirent une affiche du mur.

translations.fr: Ils retirent une affiche du mur.
translations.en: They’re taking a poster down from the wall.
translations.es: Están quitando un póster de la pared.
translations.de: Sie nehmen ein Plakat von der Wand ab.
translations.it: Stanno staccando un poster dal muro.
translations.zh-Hans: 他们正在把海报从墙上取下来。
translations.yue: 佢哋喺牆上撕緊張海報落嚟。
translations.pt: Eles estão tirando um cartaz da parede.
translations.vi: Họ đang gỡ một tấm poster khỏi tường.
translations.nl: Ze halen een poster van de muur.
translations.hi: वे दीवार से पोस्टर उतार रहे हैं.
translations.el: Βγάζουν μια αφίσα από τον τοίχο.
translations.nb: De tar ned en plakat fra veggen.
translations.id: Mereka sedang menurunkan poster dari dinding.
translations.sv: De tar ner en affisch från väggen.
translations.ro: Ei dau jos un afiș de pe perete.
translations.da: De tager en plakat ned fra væggen.
translations.ja: 彼らは壁からポスターをはがしています。

tokens.explanation: Subject personal pronoun (3rd person plural, typically masculine); clitic before the verb; controls verb agreement.
Main verb, present indicative (3rd person plural); transitive; takes direct object 'une affiche' and a source PP ('du mur').
Indefinite article, feminine singular; determiner for 'affiche'.
Common noun, feminine singular; head of the NP; direct object of 'retirent'.
Preposition (contraction of 'de' + 'le'); introduces a source PP ('mur').
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'du'.
